evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 29393071. 2018/02/26 00:00. PURPOSE: Auxiliary devices such as immobilization systems should be considered 
in synthetic CT (sCT)-based treatment planning (TP) for MRI-only brain 
radiother
evidence.source_title: MRI-only treatment planning: benefits and challenges.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 29393071. 2018/02/26 00:00. PURPOSE: Auxiliary devices such as immobilization systems should be considered 
in synthetic CT (sCT)-based treatment planning (TP) for MRI-only brain 
radiotherapy (RT). A method for auxiliary device definition in the sCT is 
introduced, and its dosimetric impact on the sCT-based TP is addressed.
METHODS: T1-VIBE DIXON was acquired in an RT setup. Ten datasets were 
retrospectively used for sCT generation. Silicone markers were used to determine 
the auxil
